nl_query: Show the complete faculty eligibility and performance chain: faculty name, department, courses they are mapped to, boards they are in the pool for, scripts assigned, scripts submitted, and their average evaluation speed.
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, au.code AS course_code, au.name AS course_name, b.id AS board_id, sa.id AS script_id, sa.total_marks AS total_marks, sa.submitted_at AS submitted_at, AVG(ea.started_at - ea.frozen_at) AS average_evaluation_speed
FROM   faculty_course_mapping fcm
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = fcm.employee_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = fcm.course_id
JOIN   board b ON b.course_id = au.id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.evaluator_id = fc.employee_id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = sa.id
WHERE  sa.evaluation_status = 'SUBMITTED'
GROUP  BY fc.name, au.code, au.name, b.id, sa.id, sa.total_marks, sa.submitted_at
ORDER  BY average_evaluation_speed DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.total_marks, script_assignment.submitted_at, script_assignment.total_marks, script_assignment.submitted_at, script_assignment.evaluation_status. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
